nasb.text: Then the Lord raised up an adversary to Solomon, Hadad the Edomite; he was of the royal line in Edom.

esv.text: And the Lord raised up an adversary against Solomon, Hadad the Edomite. He was of the royal house in Edom.

cnv.text: 於是耶和華興起一個人敵擋所羅門，他是以東王的後裔以東人哈達。

ccb.text: 耶和华使以东王的后裔哈达兴起，与所罗门为敌。
